title: Backup monitoring card on /admin
userStory: As Steve, I want a visible 'last successful backup' indicator so that a silent failure becomes loud within 36h.
acceptanceCriteria: Backup script writes a row to brain.backup_runs on success
/admin renders a card 'last successful backup: X hours ago' with a red flag if >36h
Verify: simulate a failed backup (skip the success row write); /admin card turns red within 36h
